quoteLast: , finding that the report of scarcity of    ammunition was incorrect, I returned with the squadron to the    attack.
title: History for ready reference, Volume 6
author: Larned, J. N. (Josephus Nelson), 1836-1913

quoteLast: returned to the attack. By this time the Spanish flag-ship and almost the entire Spanish fleet were in flames. At 12.30 P. M. the squadron ceased firing, the batteries being silenced, and the ships sunk, burned, and destroyed.
title: The Boys of '98
author: Otis, James, 1848-1912

title: History of the United States, Volume 5
author: Andrews, Elisha Benjamin, 1844-1917
